meaning: 湖南(位于中国中南部、长江中游)
examples: Shaoyang is in the southwest of Hunan province.
Shaoyang is in the northwest of Hunan province.
Wei Yuan (1794-1857) was born in Shaoyang, Hunan.
Of note: the delicate lobster-and-scallion mix from Shanghai, and the spicy chicken supreme with Hunan seasonings.
From Changsha in Hunan province, one of China's most productive TV markets, comes True Encounters.
